ggbscript.val:
SetValue[o_1, !o_1]
SetColor[sqr_1, If[o_1, "red", "white"]] SetColor[a_1, "black"] SetColor[b_1, "black"] SetColor[c_1, "black"] SetColor[d_1, "black"]

expression.label: text5
expression.exp: " 各圖形內的空白位置，找出各圖形的面積。"
